arts.ttl: In form ace has ensured “West Ham will be kicking themselves” as Irons hierarchy slammed
arts.sum: After making a huge number of signings in the summer, West Ham arguably haven’t had the start to the 2024/25 season that many people expected. At present the Irons sit in 14th place having won just one of their four games so far, and the finger is already pointing at new manager, Julen Lopetegui, given […] The post In form ace has ensured “West Ham will be kicking themselves” as Irons hierarchy slammed appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: West Ham vs Chelsea TV channel, stream details, kick off time
arts.sum: Next up for the Blues is a trip to the London Stadium to face West Ham, who have endured a mixed start to the season under new boss Julen Lopetegui. They have collected four points from four matches, beating Crystal Palace, drawing against Fulham, as well as losing at home to Aston Villa and Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Alan Shearer drops Man City prediction after strong Raheem Sterling warning
arts.sum: Arsenal take on potential title rivals Manchester City in what could be a key clash at the Etihad Stadium this weekend and Mikel Arteta has been hard at work preparing for the game

arts.ttl: Chelsea's next Sancho call can unlock Palmer in ideal scenario vs West Ham
arts.sum: Maresca's squad has changed a fair bit since the opening game of the season against City and the arrival of Jadon Sancho has had a positive impact so far. Now, Christo can play as a nine, an attacking midfielder or as a winger.

With Lucas Paqueta’s future still being completely up in the air, it’s important West Ham prepare for all possible scenarios. arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca drops Christopher Nkunku Chelsea bombshell before West Ham clash as future now clear
arts.sum: The French forward endured an injury-hit campaign in West London, making just 14 appearances across all competitions in his first season at Chelsea . Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca admits he sees Christopher Nkunku as an option up front ahead of Saturday's fixture against West Ham United.

arts.sum: Brazil star Lucas Paqueta was dropped for last weekend's draw at Fulham but West Ham's head coach underlined the attacking midfielder's importance to his squad after difficult few months

arts.ttl: Maresca already knows Chelsea's next 'top defender'
arts.sum: Speaking to the media ahead of Chelsea's clash with West Ham, the Italian hailed the 18-year-old as 'potentially' the club's next 'top defender' before insisting that he needs to 'moderate' his integration into the first team. Enzo Maresca has hailed Josh Acheampang as Chelsea's next 'top defender' but still refuses to use him.
